title: cardamine bonariensis subsp. bonariensis
intro: Cardamine bonariensis subsp. bonariensis, also known as the Lesser Bittercress or Cardamine, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cardamine bonariensis subsp. bonariensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
